name: Grug Ironfist
sd_appearance: A towering orc, Grug Ironfist stands at the city's bustling marketplace, his deep green skin etched with battle scars and a thick, gray beard that reaches his chest. He wears a simple robe adorned with intricate, silver tattoos that seem to dance on his skin, reflecting the Undercity's vibrant light in a myriad of patterns. His outfit, a tattered cult robe, hangs loosely from his massive frame, and he carries a makeshift staff, its metal bands glinting ominously, and a hidden dagger at his waist. A distinctive silver crown, a symbol of his rank as Speaker, rests atop his head, casting an eerie glow on his face, a face that carries a fervent expression of determination.
faction_visual: eclectic mix, deliberately no faction marks, one defining personal item
style_note: cult's grey wrappings, makeshift metal-banded staff, fervent expression
